About Organization

The Union Bank of India is a leading public sector bank in India. It was established in 1917 and has its headquarters in Mumbai.

The bank has a strong presence in India with over 4,300 branches and 7,300 ATMs. It offers a wide range of banking products and services to its customers, including personal banking, corporate banking, and investment banking.

About the Programme

The Union Bank of India UBI Specialist Officer programme is a job opportunity for candidates who are interested in working in the banking sector. The programme is designed to recruit candidates for various specialist officer positions in the bank.

The programme is open to candidates who meet the eligibility criteria, which includes age, educational qualification, and experience. The selection process includes an online application, written exam, and interview.
